subject: Geography

deployment.subject: Geography
deployment.syllabus: NCERT Grade 6 Exploring Society: India and Beyond

sourceMaterials.title: NCERT ePathshala: Exploring Society, Chapter 1 — Locating Places on the Earth
themes: directions and location relative to a reference point
coordinates as a way to identify location

requiredVocabulary.meaning: the way from one place toward another
a pair of references used to identify a location

localContextNotes: Use look-around prompts based on safe fixed references such as a door, wall, window, or the learner's seated position.
Do not ask the learner to disclose an address, school, live location, or nearby landmark.
Move from relative directions in a room to an abstract spoken grid without requiring a screen.
originalityRequirements: Write original spoken maps, grids, examples, and questions without reproducing source diagrams or wording.
Treat any exact geographic facts as out of scope unless explicitly added during human review.

notes: Builder must verify the stated map themes and vocabulary against the official chapter before approval.
